overall.description: A cinematic third-person view inside a cozy, dimly lit wooden tavern ('The Three Broomsticks'), featuring a female character standing among tables near a fireplace while other patrons occupy the space. The high-quality game engine rendering showcases warm firelight, detailed traditional timber architecture, and atmospheric interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy tavern interior with central fireplace and upper balcony

entered.detail: carved wooden tavern name sign mounted on the central support beam
large stone hearth with active fire providing warm illumination to the room
wooden railing on the second floor overlooking the main tavern area
rustic wheel-shaped light fixture hanging from the ceiling beams
wooden picnic-style tables and benches arranged for dining
warm glowing lanterns mounted on wooden support pillars
paintings and pictures decorating the wall behind the seating area

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady third-person view inside a warmly lit traditional wooden tavern. The character stands near the entrance observing the space, which features a prominent stone fireplace, upper balcony level, and scattered wooden furniture. Other patrons occupy the background - one seated near the fire and another standing on the balcony above - while wall sconces and firelight create a cozy, inviting atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric perspective within a cozy wooden tavern, capturing the warmth and stillness of the interior. It begins with a wide view of the character standing near the entrance, observing the traditional timber architecture and the soft glow of wall sconces. As the camera lingers, the focus expands to encompass the depth of the room, highlighting a prominent stone fireplace where a patron sits in the flickering light. The scene then opens further to reveal the verticality of the space, shifting upward toward an upper balcony level where another figure stands overlooking the common area. Finally, the view settles on the scattered wooden furniture and the inviting, amber-hued atmosphere that permeates the entire tavern.
